title: Datilio Onboarding: From First Upload to First Chart
summary: New Datilio users should reach a verified chart in one session using a familiar work file.

content.summary: New Datilio users should reach a verified chart in one session using a familiar work file.

body.text: Onboarding wins when time-to-first-insight is measured in minutes. Upload a CSV you know. Preview row count against expectations. Build one bar chart.

body.alt: Person working with spreadsheets and notes
body.caption: Person working with spreadsheets and notes. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload a CSV you know. Preview row count against expectations. Build one bar chart. Apply one filter.
Optional: ask Talk to Data a simple total and chart-check the answer.

items: Use synthetic data if production is restricted day one.
Save first rule after validating totals.
Screenshot preview for future audit habit.

body.text: Repeat with next week's export—apply saved rule, refresh chart, compare row count delta.
Confidence comes from repetition, not feature tours alone.
Datilio onboarding is designed around upload-preview-chart as the core muscle memory.

meta_description: New Datilio users should reach a verified chart in one session using a familiar work file.
meta_keywords: Onboarding, Datilio, First Upload, Quick Start
